no-restricted-globals.name: Date
no-restricted-globals.message: TOMB-L001: Use Temporal API instead of legacy Date.

no-restricted-globals.name: setTimeout
no-restricted-globals.message: TOMB-LEGACY-036: Use native Scheduling APIs or Temporal instead of legacy timers.

no-restricted-globals.name: setInterval
no-restricted-globals.message: TOMB-LEGACY-036: Use native Scheduling APIs instead of legacy timers.

no-restricted-syntax.message: TOMB-L001: 'new Date()' is banned. Use 'Temporal.Now.plainDateISO()' for determinism.
MANDATE-INJ: Native XSS-Unsafe methods are strictly forbidden. Use 'setHTML(value, { sanitizer })' for rehydration.
ADR-014: External Sanitizer libraries are obsolete. Use the native browser Sanitizer API (Chrome 146+).
TOMB-V006: 'execCommand' is obsolete. Use EditContext API and Custom Highlight API.
NO-JS UI DOKTRIN: Inline Event Listeners are banned. Use native Invoker Commands (commandfor) or CSS :has() logic.
